2605.23897.title: ETCHR: Editing To Clarify and Harness Reasoning
2605.23897.paper_summary: Multimodal Large Language Models have advanced visual reasoning, yet a purely textual chain of thought remains a bottleneck for questions that require fine-grained focus or view transformations. The ''think with images'' paradigm narrows this gap, but existing approaches are either constrained by fixed predefined toolkits or produce noisy intermediate images from unified multimodal methods. We pursue a third option: using a dedicated image editing model and decouple it with an understanding model. However, off-the-shelf image editors fail as reasoning assistants with two complementary gaps: a language-side gap, where editors trained as passive instruction-followers cannot map an abstract question to an appropriate visual transformation, and a generation-side gap, where edit correctness degrades as reasoning depth grows. Guided by this analysis, we introduce ETCHR (Editing To Clarify and Harness Reasoning), a question-conditioned, reasoning-aware image editor decoupled from the downstream understanding model and trained with a two-stage recipe targeted at the two gaps: Reasoning Imitation via supervised fine-tuning on edit trajectories, followed by Reasoning Enhancement with VLM-derived rewards for edit correctness and downstream reasoning accuracy. Since the editor is decoupled, ETCHR plugs into different open- and closed-source MLLMs in a training-free manner. Across five task families (fine-grained perception, chart understanding, logic reasoning, jigsaw restoration, and 3D understanding), ETCHR raises average Pass@1 from 55.95 to 60.77 (+4.82) with Qwen3-VL-8B, from 65.08 to 70.55 (+5.47) with Gemini-3.1-Flash-Lite, and from 76.55 to 81.16 (+4.61) with the 1T-parameter MoE model Kimi K2.5.
2605.23897.paper_summary_zh: 多模態大型語言模型已經在視覺推理方面取得了進展，然而，純文本的思考鏈仍然是需要細緻聚焦或視圖轉換問題的瓶頸。''以圖像思考''的範式縮小了這一差距，但現有的方法要麼受到固定預定工具包的限制，要麼從統一的多模態方法中產生噪聲中間圖像。我們追求第三種選擇：使用專門的圖像編輯模型，並將其與理解模型解耦。然而，現成的圖像編輯器作為推理助手失敗，存在兩個互補的差距：一個是語言方面的差距，訓練為被動指令跟隨者的編輯器無法將抽象問題映射到適當的視覺轉換上；另一個是生成方面的差距，隨著推理深度的增加，編輯的正確性下降。在這一分析的指導下，我們介紹了ETCHR（編輯以澄清和利用推理），這是一個與下游理解模型解耦的問題條件、推理感知的圖像編輯器，並且採用針對這兩個差距的兩階段配方進行訓練：通過對編輯軌跡的監督微調進行推理模仿，然後用來自VLM的獎勵進行推理增強，以提高編輯的正確性和下游推理的準確性。由於編輯器是解耦的，ETCHR可以以無需訓練的方式插入不同的開源和閉源MLLM。 在五個任務類別（細緻感知、圖表理解、邏輯推理、拼圖修復和3D理解）中，ETCHR使Qwen3-VL-8B的平均Pass@1從55.95提高到60.77（+4.82），使Gemini-3.1-Flash-Lite的平均Pass@1從65.08提高到70.55（+5.47），以及使1T參數的MoE模型Kimi K2.5的平均Pass@1從76.55提高到81.16（+4.61）。
2605.23897.author: Beichen Zhang et.al.
2605.23897.authors: Beichen Zhang, Yuhong Liu, Jinsong Li, Yuhang Zang, Jiaqi Wang, Dahua Lin
